title: SQL injection via string concat
description: User-controlled data concatenated into SQL string
remediation: Use parameterized queries or ORM methods

title: SQL injection via template literal
description: Template literal used to build SQL — enables injection

title: SQL injection via % formatting
description: Python % string formatting in SQL query
remediation: Use parameterized queries with ? or %s placeholders

title: Command injection via exec/spawn
description: User input passed directly to shell command
remediation: Validate and sanitize input; use execFile with arg array

title: Command injection via subprocess
description: User input passed directly to shell subprocess
remediation: Use subprocess with list args; never shell=True with user input

title: Path traversal via readFile
description: User-controlled path passed to file read operation
remediation: Sanitize with path.resolve() + check against allowed base dir

title: Path traversal via file open
remediation: Sanitize and validate against allowed directory

title: Open redirect with user input
description: Redirect URL sourced from user input enables phishing

title: Prototype pollution risk
description: Object.assign with empty object and user input enables prototype pollution
remediation: Use explicit property mapping instead of spreading request body
